entry: Portfolio strategy targeting core CBD office assets across Australian capital cities where institutional mandate restrictions limit competition.
title: Capital Cities Opportunities Fund
body: Portfolio strategy targeting core CBD office assets across Australian capital cities (Adelaide, Brisbane, Perth) where institutional mandate restrictions limit competition. Smaller cities offer better entry pricing and less crowded processes vs Sydney/Melbourne. Adelaide mandate restrictions exclude many institutional investors, creating a structural information advantage for active operators. Discussed at Transactions Meeting — limited institutional appetite currently for Adelaide office.

entry: Develop 5-10 standard deal analysis templates enabling AI pattern recognition for common deal types.
title: AI-Assisted Deal Analysis Templates
body: Develop 5-10 standard deal analysis templates enabling AI pattern recognition for common deal types (office core-plus, industrial land, development). Starting point: Forbury model integration with custom fund-level sheets. Current OP summary takes 1.25 hours for simple deals, 3+ hours for complex — AI-assisted templating could reduce this materially. Discussed at Transactions Meeting.
